red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

internal_unresolveds.reason: No FPR data available. Zero financial performance information for a $28M-$88M investment.
AOP Term is 'typically 3 years after opening' but exact duration is deal-specific and negotiable.
Guarantor Monetary Threshold specific amounts not disclosed; determined per deal. Could be material constraint.
Competing Brand Owner definition (5-hotel threshold) could restrict management company options.
Renovation/upgrade costs unpredictable; no cap on frequency or cost of mandated upgrades.
Franchise agreement assets on franchisor balance sheet ($144.8M) — likely key money/incentives. Suggests franchisor spending significantly to attract franchisees to nascent brand.
Michigan arbitration enforcement: franchisor explicitly intends to enforce arbitration despite Michigan law potentially voiding it. Legal uncertainty for Michigan franchisees.
Item 20 Table 3 shows 1 franchised outlet end 2024, Exhibit G lists 4 franchisees. Resolved: 3 are signed but not yet open (consistent with Table 5).
Item 8 says no rebates received from suppliers in 2024, but Non-Mandatory Services may include profit markup. Different categories — rebates from suppliers vs. franchisor profit on services.
